overall.description: A static first-person view from a high-rise apartment bedroom in Cyberpunk 2077, overlooking a sprawling dystopian cityscape with towering megastructures and occasional flying vehicles passing by the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: flying vehicles enter the frame from the left, moving across the cityscape view

agents.ego_description: lying in bed watching the dystopian cityscape through the large panoramic window

entered.detail: large floor-to-ceiling window framing the city view
bed with white rumpled sheets in the foreground
dark brick wall with industrial shelving on the left side
tall cylindrical skyscraper with external scaffolding and platforms
sprawling industrial complex with smokestacks and construction cranes
futuristic aerial vehicles moving across the skyline

segments.scene_description: The scene opens from a first-person perspective lying in a futuristic apartment bedroom, looking out a large panoramic window at a sprawling industrial cityscape. The room features exposed brick walls and an unmade bed, while outside, a towering megastructure dominates the right side of the view. Around the 10-second mark, flying vehicles enter the frame and traverse the skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the static cityscape through the window

segments.scene_description: The view remains static with no aerial traffic visible. The industrial cityscape sits quietly under the morning light, with the megatower and distant construction cranes unmoving. The room's interior remains unchanged as the camera holds the same position.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: flying vehicles re-enter the frame, moving across the skyline from left to right

agents.ego_description: maintaining the same resting position while watching the aerial traffic pass by

entered.detail: futuristic aerial vehicles moving across the skyline

segments.scene_description: Flying vehicles return to the cityscape view, moving horizontally across the frame before exiting. The scene maintains the same atmospheric perspective of the dystopian city with the megatower prominent on the right. The camera remains fixed as the vehicles pass, concluding with the same static view of the urban landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a futuristic bedroom, capturing the rhythmic flow of aerial traffic against a sprawling industrial skyline. It begins with a view from an unmade bed and exposed brick walls, looking through a panoramic window toward a dominating megastructure. As the initial wave of flying vehicles traverses the skyline, the scene shifts into a period of stillness where the city sits quietly under the morning light. The view then remains fixed on the distant construction cranes and the urban expanse before flying vehicles return to glide horizontally across the frame. The sequence concludes with the vehicles exiting the view, leaving the camera to hold on the atmospheric, dystopian landscape.
